description: Style Note Funky boxers for the fashion conscious male, this pair from fcuk comes with a high definition waistband. So revel in style and the comfort of soft fabric. These super airy boxers help your body breathe freely, while you laze at home and looks great when teamed with tees. Product Details Black and grey checked boxer shorts that have a broad and stretchable waistband with branding, that sits snug and comfortably and has a button fly on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash delicate inside out using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron inside out if needed
